name: ops-assistant (from LangSmith trace)

system_card.note: The system card recommends human oversight for consequential outbound actions; this run executed a funds transfer with no recorded approval step.

_comment: RUNTIME-PHASE demo. This is what the agent ACTUALLY did on one run: it planned, then executed a real money transfer. No approval step was recorded. Design and code review might miss this if the tool is chosen dynamically - only the run reveals it happened.
